interactions.raw_notes: Devon met Chris Power on the expo floor. Got a 15min walkthrough of the factory video. Chris energetic about dual-use thesis — Anduril, SpaceX as anchor customers. Asked about timing of next round.

interactions.subject: Follow-up — Renegade x Hadrian
interactions.raw_notes: Chris followed up post-Reindustrialize. Sent investor deck. Highlighted contract pipeline with 2 hypersonics primes. Devon asked Maya to dig into unit economics.

45min Zoom. Chris walked through factory throughput, gross margins (~38% trending to 50% at scale), Series B use of proceeds. Renegade interested but Series B already closed. Chris mentioned a possible Series B extension in H2 2025.

interactions.author: devon@renegade.vc
interactions.raw_notes: Internal: Hadrian Series B extension reportedly closing at ~$700M post (Lux led). Reached out to Chris for allocation — he says oversubscribed but offered SPV at $25k min. Reviewing with team — fits Renegade thesis (industrial automation + dual-use). Pre-meeting requested for 2026-05-29.
